com.truelayer.java.mandates

Interface IMandatesApi


  • public interface IMandatesApi
    Exposes all the mandates related capabilities of the library.
    See Also:
    Mandates API reference

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<CreateMandateResponse>> createMandate(CreateMandateRequest request)
      Create a new mandate
      java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<MandateDetail>> getMandate(java.lang.String mandateId)
      Get mandate
      java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<ListMandatesResponse>> listMandates(java.lang.String userId, java.lang.String cursor, java.lang.Integer limit)
      List all the mandates associated to the client used
      java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<java.lang.Void>> revokeMandate(java.lang.String mandateId)
      Revoke mandate
      java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<AuthorizationFlowResponse>> startAuthorizationFlow(java.lang.String mandateId, StartAuthorizationFlowRequest request)
      Start the authorization flow for a mandate.
      java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<AuthorizationFlowResponse>> submitProviderSelection(java.lang.String mandateId, SubmitProviderSelectionRequest request)
      Submit the provider details selected by the PSU

    • Method Detail

      • createMandate

        @POST(value="/mandates")
java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<CreateMandateResponse>> createMandate(@Body
                                                                                                                  CreateMandateRequest request)
        Create a new mandate
        Parameters:
        request - the create mandate request
        Returns:
        the created mandate
        See Also:
        Create mandate API reference

      • startAuthorizationFlow

        @POST(value="/mandates/{id}/authorization-flow")
java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<AuthorizationFlowResponse>> startAuthorizationFlow(@Path(value="id")
                                                                                                                                                       java.lang.String mandateId,
                                                                                                                                                       @Body
                                                                                                                                                       StartAuthorizationFlowRequest request)
        Start the authorization flow for a mandate.
        Parameters:
        mandateId - the id of the mandate
        request - the start authorization flow request
        Returns:
        the mandate authorization flow created
        See Also:
        Start authorization flow API reference

      • submitProviderSelection

        @POST(value="/mandates/{id}/authorization-flow/actions/provider-selection")
java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<AuthorizationFlowResponse>> submitProviderSelection(@Path(value="id")
                                                                                                                                                                                   java.lang.String mandateId,
                                                                                                                                                                                   @Body
                                                                                                                                                                                   SubmitProviderSelectionRequest request)
        Submit the provider details selected by the PSU
        Parameters:
        mandateId - the id of the mandate
        request - the provider selection request
        Returns:
        the next action to take care of
        See Also:
        Submit provider selection API reference

      • listMandates

        @GET(value="/mandates")
java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<ListMandatesResponse>> listMandates(@Query(value="user_id")
                                                                                                               java.lang.String userId,
                                                                                                               @Query(value="cursor")
                                                                                                               java.lang.String cursor,
                                                                                                               @Query(value="limit")
                                                                                                               java.lang.Integer limit)
        List all the mandates associated to the client used
        Parameters:
        userId - optional query parameters to only fetch mandates belonging to a particular user
        cursor - cursor used for pagination purposes that represents the first item of the page
        limit - maximum number of items included in a returned page
        Returns:
        the list of mandates matching the given criteria
        See Also:
        List mandates API reference

      • getMandate

        @GET(value="/mandates/{id}")
java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<MandateDetail>> getMandate(@Path(value="id")
                                                                                                           java.lang.String mandateId)
        Get mandate
        Parameters:
        mandateId - the id of the mandate
        Returns:
        the mandate matching the given id
        See Also:
        Get mandate API reference

      • revokeMandate

        @POST(value="/mandates/{id}/revoke")
java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<ApiResponse<java.lang.Void>> revokeMandate(@Path(value="id")
                                                                                                                       java.lang.String mandateId)
        Revoke mandate
        Parameters:
        mandateId - the id of the mandate
        Returns:
        an empty response in case of success
        See Also:
        Revoke mandate API reference
